entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: A Bellmarked faction reveal commits through an authorized public mechanism.
required_facts: The named seat is publicly revealed as Bellmarked.
Only now may public narration identify that allegiance.

variants.spooky: The harbor has found its advocate. {seat} was never trying to silence the bell.
variants.grim: {seat} is publicly revealed as Bellmarked. Review the updated faction objective and legal actions.
variants.gore_and_dread: The mark beneath {seat}'s skin opens like a second mouth. The bell has been speaking through that seat for some time.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: An eligible Tidebound transformation commits and becomes public.
required_facts: The named seat is now Tidebound.
Its stable-seat history and eligible inventory remain preserved.

variants.spooky: {seat} has drowned and returned. These statements are no longer contradictory.
variants.grim: {seat} is now Tidebound. Review its public form, actions, and updated faction state.
variants.gore_and_dread: Black water leaves {seat}'s mouth carrying several voices. The body rises with more memories than it entered with.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: A validated public Tidebound Chorus action increases the public chorus count.
required_facts: The Tidebound Chorus count increased.
No unrevealed Tidebound identity is exposed.

variants.spooky: The chorus gains another voice. The harbor sounds more certain of itself.
variants.grim: Tidebound Chorus progress increased to {count}. No hidden seat identity was revealed.
variants.gore_and_dread: Another drowned memory joins the song. The water in every wall begins keeping time.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: A defeated seat completes the Bell-Witness transition and the form becomes public.
required_facts: The named seat remains active as a Bell-Witness.
Its available warning action is now authoritative.

variants.spooky: Rise, Bell-Witness. The living may not hear your voice, but the bell remains receptive.
variants.grim: {seat} continues as a Bell-Witness. Review the available warning action and objective.
variants.gore_and_dread: {seat}'s body falls silent while the bell begins speaking with its teeth. The warning remains active.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: A defeated seat completes the Drowned Guide transition and the form becomes public.
required_facts: The named seat remains active as a Drowned Guide.
Its submerged-route action is now authoritative.

variants.spooky: The water has accepted {seat} as a route. Guide the living through what ended you.
variants.grim: {seat} continues as a Drowned Guide. Review the available submerged-route action.
variants.gore_and_dread: {seat}'s body settles below while its shadow rises through the current and points toward a road no lungs could follow.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: A defeated seat completes the Lighthouse Guardian transition and the form becomes public.
required_facts: The named seat remains active as a Lighthouse Guardian.
Its lighthouse protection or sacrifice action is now authoritative.

variants.spooky: {seat}'s body falls beneath the lens. Its shadow remains at the post.
variants.grim: {seat} continues as a Lighthouse Guardian. Review the available protection and sacrifice actions.
variants.gore_and_dread: The lens burns {seat}'s final outline into the wall. The body is gone, but the shadow refuses to leave the mechanism.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: An authored replacement transition commits and a Lifeboat Survivor enters the stable seat.
required_facts: The stable seat remains the same.
The replacement character and entry state are now authoritative.

variants.spooky: A lifeboat strikes the flooded street. Someone climbs out carrying {seat}'s number.
variants.grim: {seat} now controls the Lifeboat Survivor replacement character. Review its entry condition and supplies.
variants.gore_and_dread: The empty boat returns with one passenger wearing {seat}'s number and water from a voyage no one remembers launching.

entries.fallback: {seat} now continues as the Lifeboat Survivor.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: Final outcome calculation marks a named seat as escaped Living.
required_facts: The named seat escaped alive.
Any separate faction or Harbor propagation result remains independently attributed.

variants.spooky: {seat} leaves the harbor among the living. Survival is confirmed; innocence remains outside the calculation.
variants.grim: {seat} escaped alive. Review any separate personal, faction, or Harbor outcome.
variants.gore_and_dread: {seat} reaches open water breathing its own air, though the wet footprints in the boat continue after the seat stops moving.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: Final outcome calculation marks a named Restless seat's objective as completed.
required_facts: The named Restless seat completed its objective.
Living survival is not required for this attribution.

variants.spooky: {seat}'s unfinished work is finished. Death has finally lost its reason to keep the seat.
variants.gore_and_dread: The final obligation tears free from {seat}'s dead shape. What remains sinks without resistance.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: Final outcome calculation selects the Harbor Sealed ending.
required_facts: The lighthouse and bell can no longer anchor the Harbor to the living world.
The Harbor is contained, though every drowned resident may not be released.

variants.spooky: The last light dies. The streets descend. For the first time in a century, the harbor is merely drowned.
variants.grim: The Harbor is sealed. Its lighthouse and bell no longer anchor it to the living world.
variants.gore_and_dread: The lens bursts, the bell splits, and the town folds beneath the tide with every trapped mouth still forming its final name.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: Final outcome calculation selects the Drowned Released ending.
required_facts: The trapped drowned residents are released from the Harbor mechanism.
The Harbor can no longer remain assembled from their unresolved memories.

variants.spooky: The bells ring without names. One by one, the harbor's windows go dark. This time, darkness is an ending.
variants.grim: The drowned residents are released. The Harbor loses the memories that held it together.
variants.gore_and_dread: The bell gives one final cry as drowned faces rise through the streets, shed their ruined bodies, and follow the light away.

entries.speaker: underteller
entries.public_trigger: Final outcome calculation selects the Harbor Rises ending.
required_facts: The Harbor persists above water.
Its lighthouse, bell, or memory anchor remains active.

variants.spooky: The tide returns, but the town does not sink. Somewhere beyond the fog, cartographers begin correcting their charts.
variants.grim: The Harbor remains above water and returns to the living world.
variants.gore_and_dread: Water pours from roofs and mouths, yet the streets remain. The town has remembered how to stay.
